name: Pee Wee Golf & Arcade
about: Guerneville Pee Wee Golf is a family-oriented entertainment venue offering 36 holes of mini golf across two distinct courses. The facility provides a casual environment for all ages, with additional amenities including a black light golf course, a golf simulator, and an arcade featuring pool and ping pong tables. The location is suited for recreational play and casual outings, operating primarily on weekends with weekday visits available by appointment.
why_golfers_like_it: Variety of golf experiences with traditional and black light courses
On-site golf simulator for weather-proof practice and play
Central location in the Russian River area for convenient access

food_and_drink.notes: Picnic areas with tables and BBQs available for guests to bring their own food
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB not explicitly confirmed

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify if club rentals are available for the golf simulator or mini golf courses.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers picnic areas with tables and BBQs where guests can bring their own food.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue does not provide specific timing information for playing 18 holes of mini golf.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Guerneville Pee Wee Golf explicitly markets itself as family-friendly with two 18-hole courses and arcade games suitable for all ages.
